# PERF-222 negative: concrete function in loop
lang: go
file: PERF-222-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Item struct {
	Value int
}

func processItem(v Item) int {
	return 1
}

func Render(items []Item) int {
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		total += processItem(item)
	}
	return total
}
